reasoning_top2: Tiny standardized β=0.047 with t=2.177 barely clears p<0.05 — a marginal hit emerging from a wide sweep across many asset×wellbeing cells invites multiple-comparison fragility.
Large CFPS sample aids precision, but such trivial cross-sectional coefficients on a specific asset-behaviour pairing routinely shrink or flip when the covariate set or sample composition changes.
